name: wesktop
help: A Python framework for building web-based desktop applications

diagnose.name: diagnose
diagnose.help: Check runtime environment, installed dependencies, and configuration paths

config.name: config
config.help: Manage persistent configuration values stored in the config file

path.name: path
path.help: Print the absolute path to the config file for this application

show.name: show
show.help: Show all config values with their sources (config file, env, or default)

flags.name: plain
flags.help: Display config values in a human-readable table format

flags.name: json
flags.help: Display config values as a JSON object with source metadata

set.name: set
set.help: Set a persistent config value that overrides the default for a flag

flags.name: clear
flags.help: Clear a repeatable flag by setting its value to an empty list

flags.name: default
flags.help: Reset a key to its default value by removing it from the config file

args.name: key
args.help: The config key to set, matching a registered flag name

args.name: value
args.help: Value to set (comma-separated for repeatable flags, use backslash to escape commas)

edit.name: edit
edit.help: Open the config file for manual editing in $EDITOR (creates if missing)

init.name: init
init.help: Generate a template config file with documented fields and defaults
